mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, address, zone_code, road_address, detail_address FROM address_table ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, user_id, address, zone_code, road_address, detail_address FROM address_table WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO address_table ( user_id, address, zone_code, road_address, detail_address ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{address}, #{zoneCode}, #{roadAddress}, #{detailAddress} )
mapper.update: UPDATE address_table SET user_id = #{userId}, address = #{address}, zone_code = #{zoneCode}, road_address = #{roadAddress}, detail_address = #{detailAddress} WHERE id = #{id}
